description: You are a molecular biologist investigating potential DNA cruciform structures in the human insulin gene. Using the GenBank record at ~/UGENE_Data/human_insulin_gene.gb, identify all perfect inverted repeats (minimum length 8, 100% identity). Export these repeat annotations to ~/UGENE_Data/repeat_analysis/inverted_repeats.gff. Create a summary text file at ~/UGENE_Data/repeat_analysis/summary.txt documenting the total number of inverted repeat features found and the start and end coordinates of the first repeat feature.
